title: Anime Character Design Fundamentals
title_jp: アニメキャラクターデザインの基礎
summary: Start your journey into character design by learning how memorable anime-inspired characters are created from simple ideas. You'll explore facial expressions, proportions, poses, and personality while building the confidence to design original characters that feel expressive, unique, and ready for illustrations, comics, or games.

description: Start your creative journey with Anime Character Design Fundamentals and discover how professional artists transform simple ideas into memorable characters. As you progress, you'll create original characters with unique identities, explore visual storytelling techniques, and understand the design principles used across anime, manga, games, and digital illustration.
